notes: Minimum positive case for the T+1 historical replay path. Verifies the five-field replay bundle round-trips cleanly with hash equality and no live model call. v0.2.1: input_hash and output_hash promoted from dummy placeholders to real sha256 hex digests so reasoner-runtime regression can do hash-equality assertions against runtime sha256_text(). Companion negative cases (missing replay field, manifest absent, output drift) to be added in subsequent issues.
